compensation.title: Compensation Center
compensation.subtitle: Review every damage-related compensation case, the signed amount, payment progress, and the exact offline settlement steps.
compensation.emptyMessage: There are currently no compensation cases assigned to you. If a damage review requires payment later, it will appear here.

steps.reviewBody: The asset office checks the pickup/return photos, the written damage report, and the original purchase price before confirming the official compensation amount.
steps.signatureBody: Bring your student ID, the booking screenshot, and the case reference to the listed office. Staff will confirm the signed amount and issue the payment reference.
steps.paymentBody: After the form is signed, pay at the campus finance desk or by the approved transfer method shared by staff. Always include the compensation reference in your payment note.
steps.closureBody: Once finance records the payment, the admin updates the case in the web portal and the mobile app will reflect the new status. Any remaining balance will continue to show here.

compensation.recordsEmpty: No compensation records yet. Signature updates, payments, and status changes will appear here.

helpManual.title: UniGear Help Manual
helpManual.intro: This page summarizes the current borrowing, return, overdue, credit-score, and compensation rules implemented in the system. It can be used directly in the project handbook or presentation.
helpManual.note: If earlier project documents differ from this page, follow this page and the current system implementation. Compensation amounts are estimates and remain subject to final admin verification.

status.title: Status Guide
items: Pending: the user has submitted a reservation and is waiting for admin review.
Approved: the reservation has been approved, and the user may scan to pick up on or after the start date.
Active: the user has completed QR activation and the borrowing period has officially started.
Overdue: the due date has passed without a return, and the system will deduct credit at checkpoint nodes.
Returned: the user has completed the return flow and the system has recorded the return.
Cancelled / Suspended: cancelled means the reservation has ended; suspended usually means maintenance has temporarily paused the booking.

borrowing.title: Borrowing & Pickup Rules
items: Users submit reservation requests from the asset detail page after choosing a date range. The system checks for conflicts before creating the booking.
A new booking first enters Pending. It becomes Approved only after admin review.
Users cannot pick up items before the booking start date. Pickup requires an on-site QR scan.
After scan confirmation, the booking changes from Approved to Active and the borrowing period starts.
The current version also supports pickup photo records to preserve the initial handover condition of the asset.

returning.title: Return & Damage Handling
items: Bookings in Active or Overdue status can be returned, and a return photo is required during the process.
If the asset has problems, the user may submit a damage report. Minor, moderate, and severe damage require evidence photos, while lost-item cases may omit photos.
Damage reports follow this flow: open → investigating → resolved or dismissed.
When an admin confirms the damage, the system deducts credit according to severity and estimates compensation under the defined rules.
If a returned asset is later confirmed damaged, the previous +5 return bonus may be revoked.

credit.title: Credit Score Rules
items: Users start with 100 credit points, and the score is limited to the range 0 to 200.
A normal successful return grants +5 credit points.
Overdue penalties use a three-checkpoint system: Day 1 deducts 10 points, Day 7 deducts another 15, and Day 30 deducts another 25, with overdue deductions capped at 50 total.
Standard damage penalties are: minor damage -5, moderate damage -15, severe damage -30.

Lost-item penalties vary by scenario: no extra loss penalty is applied when the system auto-classifies an item as lost after 30 overdue days; self-reported loss deducts -30; admin-confirmed malicious swap or serious loss can deduct -50.

compensation.title: Compensation Rules
items: For assets with a recorded purchase price, the system estimates compensation using: Purchase Price × Depreciation Rate × Damage Coefficient.
Depreciation rates are based on service life: within 1 year = 100%, 1-3 years = 80%, 3-5 years = 50%, over 5 years = 20%.
Damage coefficients are: minor 0.2, moderate 0.5, severe 1.0.
For lost items, self-reported loss uses the depreciated price, while system-auto-lost or admin-confirmed loss uses the full purchase price with no depreciation.
If the asset has no recorded purchase price, the system cannot calculate compensation automatically and an admin must verify it offline.

assetDetail.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!
assetDetail.compensationNote: Compensation = Purchase Price × Depr. Rate × Severity Coefficient

notifications.emptyMessage: Booking approvals and return reminders will appear here

overdueAlert.title: Overdue Return Penalty

overdueAlert.lostReminder: Overdue for more than 30 days. The system has automatically declared this asset lost. Please contact an admin immediately to arrange compensation.

reported.title: Damage Report Filed
reported.message: An admin has filed a damage report for your borrowed item "{{asset}}". The current assessment is {{severity}} and the report is under review.

investigating.title: Damage Investigation Started
investigating.message: The damage report for "{{asset}}" is now under investigation. We will notify you again once the review is completed.

dismissed.title: Damage Report Dismissed
dismissed.message: The damage report for "{{asset}}" has been dismissed. No credit deduction or compensation will be applied.

resolved.title: Damage Review Result
resolved.base: The damage report for "{{asset}}" has been confirmed as {{severity}}.
resolved.totalCreditImpact: Total credit impact this time: -{{points}} points.
resolved.compensation: Compensation due: ¥{{amount}}. Please contact the admin to settle it offline.

underReview.title: Compensation Case Opened
underReview.message: The asset office is reviewing the damage evidence and purchase value. You will be notified again once the final amount is confirmed.

awaitingSignature.title: Signature Required

awaitingPayment.title: Compensation Payment Required

partiallyPaid.title: Partial Payment Recorded

paid.title: Compensation Settled
paid.message: Finance has confirmed the full payment. This compensation case is now closed.

waived.title: Compensation Waived
waived.message: The case has been updated to waived status. No further payment is required.

paymentRecorded.title: Payment Recorded
